content.situation: 你在机场退税柜台前，主动向工作人员礼貌打招呼并表达办理退税的意愿
content.speakerText: Good morning. I'd like to ______ my tax refund.
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，我想办理我的退税。
content.responseTemplate: Good morning. I'd like to ______ my tax refund.
content.hint: 在正式场合表达‘办理退税’，常用动词是 claim，强调正式申请流程
content.knowledgePoint: 正式场合的高频动词搭配

content.situation: 工作人员询问你是否准备好单据，你需要礼貌地确认并递上材料
content.speakerText: I have everything ready. Here are my receipts and the tax-free form — all ______.
content.speakerTextCn: 我准备好了，这是我的收据和免税单，都……
content.responseTemplate: I have everything ready. Here are my receipts and the tax-free form — all ______.
content.hint: 退税单据被接受的关键是签名和盖章，这是官方流程中的标准表达

content.situation: 工作人员确认信息后，你礼貌地回应并表示感谢
content.speakerText: Thank you for your help. I really ______.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你的帮助，我真的很……
content.responseTemplate: Thank you for your help. I really ______.
content.hint: 表达感谢时，'I really appreciate it' 是最自然、最常用的礼貌回应
